name: PELVIC FLOOR
definition: musculofascial diaphragm inserted on pelvic bones network of connective tissue that lies deep to peritoneum and supports pelvic organs connective tissue condensations of obturator + levator ani fascia that runs obliquely diamond-shaped structure consisting of two triangles with transverse perineus muscle
dominant_finding: integrity inferred by efficiency of provided support
distribution: curved shape with inferior concavity (COR plane)
discriminating_features: too thin to be recognized except for its condensations: cardinal lig., uterosacral
integrity inferred by efficiency of provided support
nonvisualized U-shaped sling inserting on inner pubis + passing around anorectal
encloses urogenital hiatus (= space for urethra + vagina + anal canal)
